phrases.intent_en: Where to buy MHD tram tickets
phrases.text_local: Kde koupím lístek na tramvaj MHD?
phrases.cultural_note: MHD stops have distinctive yellow ticket machines.

likely_response.local: U žlutého automatu přímo na zastávce.
likely_response.translation_en: At the yellow machine right at the stop.

responses.english: At the yellow machine right at the stop.
responses.local: U žlutého automatu přímo na zastávce.

phrases.cultural_note: Validation is mandatory immediately upon entering the vehicle.

likely_response.local: Hned po nástupu, dovnitř do strojku.
likely_response.translation_en: Right after boarding, inside the machine.

responses.english: Right after boarding, inside the machine.
responses.local: Hned po nástupu, dovnitř do strojku.

phrases.intent_en: When does the next FlixBus to Prague depart
phrases.text_local: Kdy jede další FlixBus do Prahy?
phrases.cultural_note: Platform numbers are often called out with departure times.

likely_response.local: Za dvacet minut od nástupiště sedm.
likely_response.translation_en: In twenty minutes from platform seven.

responses.english: In twenty minutes from platform seven.
responses.local: Za dvacet minut od nástupiště sedm.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the RegioJet waiting room
phrases.cultural_note: Czech stations often use color cues for private waiting rooms.

likely_response.translation_en: On the right past the ticket counters, yellow door.

responses.english: On the right past the ticket counters, yellow door.

phrases.intent_en: Is there wheelchair access to platforms
phrases.cultural_note: Major transport hubs in Czechia are generally accessible.

likely_response.local: Ano, hlavní nástupiště jsou bez schodů.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the main platforms are without stairs.

responses.english: Yes, the main platforms are without stairs.
responses.local: Ano, hlavní nástupiště jsou bez schodů.
